description: Microsoft 365 administration via Graph API application permissions (read-only by default).
name: io.github.okapi-ca/ms-365-admin

environmentVariables.description: Azure AD tenant ID (specific GUID, not 'common').
environmentVariables.name: MS365_ADMIN_MCP_TENANT_ID

environmentVariables.description: App registration client ID with the required application permissions.
environmentVariables.name: MS365_ADMIN_MCP_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: App registration client secret. Prefer Azure Key Vault via MS365_ADMIN_MCP_KEYVAULT_URL for production.
environmentVariables.name: MS365_ADMIN_MCP_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Optional Azure Key Vault URL. When set, secrets are pulled from the vault and override the env-var values above.
environmentVariables.name: MS365_ADMIN_MCP_KEYVAULT_URL

environmentVariables.description: Cap on the $top query parameter to limit result size.
environmentVariables.name: MS365_ADMIN_MCP_MAX_TOP

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' or '1' to force read-only mode (default behavior; mutations require --allow-writes).
environmentVariables.name: READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Regex to filter the catalog of available tools.
environmentVariables.name: ENABLED_TOOLS

title: Microsoft 365 Admin
